mapper.select: SELECT `id`, `reservation_id` AS `reservationId`, `user_email` AS `userEmail`, `rating`, `mileage`, `image_1` AS `image1`, `image_2` AS `image2`, `created_at` AS `createdAt` FROM `car`.`reviews` WHERE `id` = #{id}

SELECT `id`, `reservation_id` AS `reservationId`, `user_email` AS `userEmail`, `rating`, `mileage`, `image_1` AS `image1`, `image_2` AS `image2`, `created_at` AS `createdAt` FROM `car`.`reviews` WHERE `reservation_id` = #{reservationId}

SELECT `id`, `reservation_id` AS `reservationId`, `rating`, `mileage`, `image_1` AS `image1`, `image_2` AS `image2`, `created_at` AS `createdAt` FROM `car`.`reviews` WHERE `user_email` = #{userEmail} ORDER BY `created_at` DESC
